deployments.description: Added payment search feature with new database query for transaction lookup by user and date range. Includes new API endpoint /payments/search.
known_risks: New database query pattern not tested at production scale
Query uses LIKE on transaction_reference field

deployments.description: Updated payment gateway integration to use new response format from gateway API v3. Adds support for partial authorisations.
known_risks: Payment gateway API response format change
Missing integration tests for new gateway response format

deployments.description: Added email template caching for improved rendering performance. Cache stores rendered templates for 24 hours.
known_risks: In-memory cache with no eviction policy
Cache size unbounded

deployments.description: Tightened input validation for payment request fields. Added strict ISO 8601 date format validation for all date fields. Added maximum field length validation.
known_risks: Breaking change to date field format may affect existing consumers
Existing consumers sending non-ISO date formats will receive 422 errors

deployments.description: Migrated to new Redis URI format (redis:// → redis+tls://) for TLS-enabled Redis connections. Includes Redis client upgrade.
known_risks: Redis URI format change incompatible with older client versions
Client library version mismatch may cause connection failures

deployments.description: Updated nginx rate limiter configuration to use shared memory zones for better multi-worker coordination. Adjusted rate limit thresholds.
known_risks: Shared memory zone size may be misconfigured
Rate limiter configuration not tested under production load

deployments.description: Updated Order model type annotations for improved runtime type safety. Changed status field from string to OrderStatus enum type.
known_risks: Type annotation change may break serialization of existing orders in DB
Implicit type conversion may fail for historical records

deployments.description: New batch reconciliation job that runs at 8 PM daily to reconcile payment records with bank statements. Runs parallel queries for performance.
known_risks: Batch job uses up to 80 parallel DB connections
Runs during peak traffic hours (8 PM)
No connection limit configured

deployments.description: Payment search feature with transaction lookup by status. New API endpoint /payments/search?status= that filters transactions by payment status.
known_risks: Query on status field uses ILIKE without index
Payment table has 50M rows — full table scan risk

deployments.description: Updated Redis TTL settings for session token storage. Changed default TTL from 86400 (24 hours) to reduce stale session risk.
known_risks: TTL value may be in wrong unit (seconds vs milliseconds)
Short TTL will cause high cache miss rate

deployments.description: Added async structured logging middleware for improved observability. Each request spawns a goroutine to write logs asynchronously to reduce latency impact.
known_risks: Unbounded goroutine creation under high load
No goroutine pool limiting

deployments.description: New bulk inventory reservation feature for multi-item orders. Allows reserving multiple SKUs atomically in a single API call.
known_risks: Nil pointer dereference if optional reservation config field is absent
No nil check added for optional configuration

deployments.description: Added audit logging for order processing events. Uses regex pattern matching on order descriptions for classification.
known_risks: Regex pattern for audit classification not anchored
Potential for catastrophic backtracking on long order descriptions

deployments.description: Improved transaction security: switched to on-demand RSA-4096 key generation for each transaction signing. Replaces pre-generated key pool.
known_risks: RSA-4096 key generation is CPU intensive (~200ms)
No CPU load testing performed for this change

deployments.description: Rotated JWT signing secret key as part of quarterly security credential rotation. New key deployed immediately.
known_risks: No dual-key verification period — all old tokens invalidated immediately
Users mid-session will need to re-authenticate

deployments.description: Integrated distributed tracing (OpenTelemetry) for end-to-end request visibility. Adds trace spans around all downstream service calls.
known_risks: Tracing instrumentation may inadvertently make async calls sequential
Performance impact of tracing not measured

deployments.description: Major routing configuration update: migrated from nginx.conf to YAML-based routing configuration. All routes rewritten in new format.
known_risks: YAML syntax not validated
No nginx -t test in deployment pipeline
Complete route rewrite — any syntax error causes total outage

deployments.description: New order cancellation flow with refund initiation. Uses nested database transactions to ensure atomicity of cancellation and refund operations.
known_risks: Nested transaction cleanup not tested under error conditions
Complex savepoint handling may leak connections on exception

deployments.description: Updated payment gateway retry configuration: increased max retries from 1 to 5, added exponential backoff. Intended to improve resilience to transient gateway errors.
known_risks: High retry count without circuit breaker can amplify latency
No total timeout budget for retry sequence
Under gateway degradation, total response time can exceed 30 seconds

deployments.description: User profile export feature: allows users to download their complete account history as JSON. Serializes all historical orders, payments, and preferences.
known_risks: Synchronous JSON serialization on main Node.js event loop
Large accounts (thousands of records) may block event loop for 5-30 seconds

deployments.description: Added real-time order status push notifications using server-sent events. Registers event listeners for order status changes on WebSocket connection establishment.
known_risks: Event listeners may not be cleaned up on connection close
Memory leak possible if listeners accumulate

deployments.description: Bulk inventory update feature for warehouse management integration. Allows batch updates of stock levels for hundreds of SKUs in a single operation.
known_risks: Bulk updates hold row-level locks for duration of multi-step operation
Under high concurrency, lock contention may exhaust connection pool

deployments.description: Enhanced JWT header validation with additional security checks. Added regex-based validation for token format and claims.
known_risks: Regex used for header validation without complexity analysis
Potential for catastrophic backtracking on malformed tokens

deployments.description: New order history endpoint: GET /orders/history returns paginated list of user's orders with payment details. Added ORM relationships for payment data.
known_risks: ORM relationship may trigger N+1 queries for payment details
Not tested with accounts having >50 orders

deployments.description: User analytics tracking feature: records page views, session duration, and feature usage for product analytics. Uses Redis to buffer analytics events.
known_risks: Creates new Redis client per request rather than using shared pool
Redis connection leak under sustained load

deployments.description: Changed internal product ID format from UUID strings to integer IDs for performance optimization. All product ID fields updated across order models.
known_risks: Breaking change to product ID format
downstream services expecting UUID format will receive 422 validation errors
inventory-service not yet updated to accept integer IDs

deployments.description: Updated CA certificate bundle to remove expired certificates and add new root CAs. Cleaned up intermediate CA certificates that are no longer in the trust chain.
known_risks: Removing intermediate CAs may break external TLS connections
Payment processor certificate chains not validated against new bundle

deployments.description: Added gzip response compression middleware to reduce bandwidth usage for API responses. Compression applied to all JSON responses.
known_risks: Compression overhead may exceed transfer savings for small responses
Not benchmarked for blocking operations on bulk endpoints

deployments.description: Currency conversion feature for multi-currency payment support. Handles conversion between 15 supported currencies using real-time exchange rates.
known_risks: Float arithmetic used for currency conversion
Potential precision loss for large amounts (>$10,000)
DECIMAL(10,2) DB column may overflow with floating-point precision errors

deployments.description: Renewed TLS certificate for api.company.com domain. New certificate has 2-year validity. Includes updated OCSP configuration.
known_risks: OCSP stapling not configured — each new TLS connection may fetch OCSP response synchronously
OCSP response fetch time adds 2-3 seconds to new connection TLS handshake
